title: Colorful Depot
description: Compatibility for Create: Colorful Pipes & Dye Depot
body:
# Colorful Depot
Compatibility addon for [Create: Colorful Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-colorful-pipes) & [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot)

Adds Dye Depot palette support with 16 additional color variants for pipes, tanks, and fluid components while keeping full functionality and Create-style visuals.

Recommended alongside [Dye The World](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-the-world) for additional color variants across Create and other compatible mods.

![16 colored Fluid pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s1I9GeSl/images/2cfbf4c20886163886efb0fbbc00b4ca48d8e527.png)
